acts_1_2_levels_1_25.why: Teaches curse tempo (prime → detonate) before Hexblast exists; shares passive tree with endgame

ascendancy.effect: Grants Life Remnants + life-cost casting; identity node—take immediately
ascendancy.playstyle_shift: Start managing life spend; watch orb; teach the habit on small numbers

gear_targets.weapon: Wand or Staff with spell damage

passive_tree: Path toward Witch chaos/spell damage (overlap with endgame tree)
notes: No resspec cost at level 1-5; experiment freely
Essence Drain is tanky; use this phase to learn movement and rhythm
Resistances cap at 0% (unneeded acts 1-2); focus life + damage

act_3_levels_26_40.why: Rehearse two-beat (Despair → Drain) before Hexblast; introduce curse rhythm

ascendancy.timing: Complete 2nd trial for 15% base spell crit
ascendancy.effect: Sets spell crit to 15%; every crit node now multiplies a respectable base
ascendancy.note: Drain won't crit much; pre-investment for Hexblast

curse_introduction.role: Lower chaos res; reduces resistance past 0% is a multiplier
curse_introduction.rotation: Despair → Drain → move → Despair again (queue next curse before recast)
curse_introduction.timing: Queue immediately; don't wait for cooldown

gear_targets.weapon: Spell damage wand or staff; crit bonus if available
gear_targets.resistances: 60%+ fire/cold/lightning (work toward 75% cap by act 3 end)

passive_tree: Previous + second life wheel (Ranger or Witch)
notes: Despair teaches curse rotation; this is the future two-beat
Crit doesn't scale much yet; focus on life + chaos damage
Act 3 content is harder; maintain resistance cap

level_41_ignition.action: Equip Hexblast; socket first supports immediately
first_supports: Spell Critical Strike Chance (first; multiplies 15% base)
Increased Area of Effect (pack overlap, chain jumpable)
level_41_ignition.rotation_shift: Despair → Hexblast → move → repeat (not Drain anymore)
level_41_ignition.adjustment: 1-2 play sessions; rhythm is slower per cast but much heavier per hit than DoT

ascendancy.timing: Complete 3rd trial for crit damage = life pool multiplier
ascendancy.effect: Crit damage now scales off maximum life; all life nodes are damage nodes post-this

gear_shift.weapon_now_matters: Spell damage + crit chance + cast speed become primary

notes: First Hexblast cast feels weak; supports carry; add 3rd/4th support quickly
Learn two-beat rhythm (curse → blast); it's different from DoT spam
Despair MUST land before Hexblast to detonate; queue always

ascendancy.effect: Reserve enemy life + shut down regen; quiet bossing multiplier

ascendancy.trial_5: Crimson Power (if gear budget growing; ES → life) OR Vitality Siphon (if squish; third recovery layer)
ascendancy.timing: Post-tier 6; build defensive or offense layer

maps_levels_59_85.gear_shopping: Use gear-checklist.json and mods-priority.json per tier

endgame_levels_86_100.gear: Hunting for perfect rolls; diminishing returns
endgame_levels_86_100.passive_tree: Jewel sockets + respec lower-value nodes for jewels

common_leveling_mistakes.consequence: Miss the build's identity; life-cost mechanic doesn't engage
common_leveling_mistakes.fix: Take Sanguimancy at first trial in Act 2
Aim for 10-15% total crit acts 1-3; ramp post-Hexblast
Cap resistances by end of Act 3 (75% fire/cold/lightning)

common_leveling_mistakes.mistake: Holding onto suboptimal weapon too long
common_leveling_mistakes.fix: Weapon is highest damage leverage; upgrade first, rings/boots second

common_leveling_mistakes.consequence: Rhythm breaks; time between casts is danger zone
common_leveling_mistakes.fix: Non-negotiable 25%+ movement speed on boots at all times

common_leveling_mistakes.mistake: Over-leveling gem relative to life pool
common_leveling_mistakes.consequence: Casting kills self (higher level = higher life cost)
common_leveling_mistakes.fix: Level gem with life; drop gem one level if costs become lethal
